mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.comments, a.likes, a.createdTime, u.id, u.name, u.avatar FROM article_search a LEFT JOIN user_search u ON a.user_id = u.id
a.status = 1
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY a.pub_time DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_search a
a.status = 1
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
